title: Somehow, It’s December Again
content:
Some days it felt like time stopped but the other time just flied. And now we’ve arrived at the final page, wondering how we got here. No big reflections this time, just accepting that the months have quietly passed by.

Took this photo of the moon last night. It’s the same moon, almost the same every month. But the moon is always changing. This time of year feels similar, a reminder that even familiar cycles can carry us somewhere new.

So here we are again, another December, looking much like the one before. We moved in small ways but some parts remained still.
